text.title: Risk Register Examples
text.summary: End-to-end worked examples illustrating rule application and artefact shape.

example.title: Five-risk software project register
example.note: R-01 Key developer leaves: Org, P=M I=H Score=12, Mitigate (cross-train), Owner=PM. R-02 API deprecated: Ext, P=L I=VH Score=10, Accept (contingency $5k), Owner=ArchLead. R-03 Scope creep: PM, P=H I=M Score=12, Avoid (CR process), Owner=PM. R-04 Perf under load: Tech, P=M I=M Score=9, Mitigate (load test sprint 3), Owner=QA. O-01 Early delivery: P=M I=H Score=12, Enhance (fast-track critical path).
